metadata.name: kube-vip DaemonSet
metadata.description: Practical kube-vip DaemonSet bootstrap with RBAC for control-plane virtual IPs and optional Service LoadBalancer handling in bare-metal clusters.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
Creates the RBAC resources and DaemonSet needed to run kube-vip inside an existing cluster. This template is aimed at K3s and similar bare-metal distributions where kube-vip is deployed after the first control-plane node is already online.

## Typical Use
- Enable `control_plane_enabled` when kube-vip should advertise a stable API VIP for an HA control plane.
- Enable `services_enabled` when kube-vip should also watch `LoadBalancer` services.
- Keep ARP mode for the first iteration unless you already know you need BGP or routing-table mode.

## Notes
- At least one of `control_plane_enabled` or `services_enabled` should be true.
- Service load balancer mode usually expects either explicit `spec.loadBalancerIP` values, the `kube-vip.io/loadbalancerIPs` annotation, or the kube-vip cloud provider for IP allocation.
- `control_plane_only` keeps the DaemonSet on control-plane nodes, which is a sensible default for smaller homelabs.

## References
- [kube-vip Installation](https://kube-vip.io/docs/installation/)
- [kube-vip DaemonSet](https://kube-vip.io/docs/installation/daemonset/)
- [kube-vip ARP Mode](https://kube-vip.io/docs/modes/arp/)

variables.name: namespace
variables.title: Namespace
variables.description: Namespace where kube-vip should run.

variables.name: service_account_name
variables.title: Service account
variables.description: Service account name used by the kube-vip DaemonSet.

variables.name: daemonset_name
variables.title: DaemonSet name
variables.description: Name of the kube-vip DaemonSet.

variables.name: image
variables.title: Image
variables.description: Container image for kube-vip.

variables.name: interface
variables.title: Primary interface
variables.description: Host interface used by kube-vip for ARP announcements and VIP binding.

variables.name: services_interface_enabled
variables.title: Services interface
variables.description: Use a separate interface for Service LoadBalancer announcements.

variables.name: services_interface
variables.title: Services interface name
variables.description: Interface used for service advertisements when a dedicated interface is required.

variables.name: vip_address
variables.title: Control-plane VIP
variables.description: Virtual IP for the Kubernetes API when control-plane mode is enabled.

variables.name: vip_subnet
variables.title: VIP subnet mask
variables.description: Subnet mask used for the advertised VIP.

variables.name: control_plane_port
variables.title: API port
variables.description: Kubernetes API port exposed by the control-plane VIP.

variables.name: control_plane_enabled
variables.title: Control-plane VIP
variables.description: Advertise a floating VIP for the Kubernetes API.

variables.name: services_enabled
variables.title: Service LoadBalancer
variables.description: Watch and advertise Kubernetes Services of type LoadBalancer.

variables.name: service_election_enabled
variables.title: Per-service election
variables.description: Use a separate leader election for each service when service mode is enabled.

variables.name: leader_election_enabled
variables.title: Leader election
variables.description: Enable kube-vip leader election for ARP mode.

variables.name: watch_services_namespace_enabled
variables.title: Watch one namespace
variables.description: Restrict service mode to a specific namespace instead of the whole cluster.

variables.name: watch_services_namespace
variables.title: Watched namespace
variables.description: Namespace watched by kube-vip when scoped service mode is enabled.

variables.name: lease_duration
variables.title: Lease duration
variables.description: Lease duration in seconds for leader election.

variables.name: renew_deadline
variables.title: Renew deadline
variables.description: Renew deadline in seconds for leader election.

variables.name: retry_period
variables.title: Retry period
variables.description: Retry period in seconds for leader election.

variables.name: control_plane_only
variables.title: Control-plane nodes only
variables.description: Schedule kube-vip only on nodes labeled as control-plane or master.
